project.name: SylphxAI GitHub Organization Configuration
project.summary: Organization-level GitHub configuration, community health files, reusable workflows, workflow templates, shared GitHub Actions, brand references, and repository bootstrap templates.

surfaces.name: Organization profile
surfaces.description: Public GitHub organization profile.

surfaces.name: Community health files
surfaces.description: Organization-wide code of conduct, contributing, security, issue, and pull-request templates.

surfaces.name: ADR-29 reusable admission workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable admission workflow consumed by SylphxAI repositories.

surfaces.name: Release reusable workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable release workflow for package release automation.

surfaces.name: Publish to NPM reusable workflow
surfaces.description: Reusable npm publish workflow with Changesets integration.

surfaces.name: ADR-29 admission composite action
surfaces.description: Shared composite action implementing ADR-29 admission logic.

surfaces.name: Changesets publisher setup action
surfaces.description: Installs the manager-aware Changesets publisher used by release workflows.

surfaces.name: GroundAtlas local control-plane gate
surfaces.description: Repository-local GroundAtlas package dogfood and project-control validation.

surfaces.name: Public skills external admission
surfaces.description: Target-scoped organization required workflow that validates the public skills candidate from source-owned policy bytes.

surfaces.name: Public skills merge-queue barrier
surfaces.description: Target-scoped read-only organization required workflow that passes only for exact external success plus confirmed active/effective policy and leaves queue removal to GitHub.

surfaces.name: Public skills external admission policy
surfaces.description: Exact repository identity, approved commit/tree/parent and ref graph, dynamic event-HEAD, eight-skill, provenance, content-boundary, and full-tree digest contract.

surfaces.name: Public skills merge-queue barrier runtime policy
surfaces.description: Exact source, target, guarded-ruleset, workflow-check, zero-bypass barrier and bounded polling invariants for safe merge-queue activation.

surfaces.name: Public skills activation-attestation ruleset policy
surfaces.description: Canonical source identity and exact immutable zero-bypass tag-ruleset payload for durable nonce-scoped activation attestations.

surfaces.name: Public skills zero-dependency admission validator
surfaces.description: Source-owned Git-object validator that never executes candidate code.

surfaces.name: Public skills merge-queue barrier controller
surfaces.description: Source-owned fixed-host read-only controller that observes the exact external check/ruleset and fails every merge group that lacks both required predicates.

surfaces.name: Public skills organization-ruleset executor
surfaces.description: Protected stdlib-only executor that consumes canonical Doctrine-main data, reconciles the required-workflow rule under an authorization-bound lock, creates durable provider attestations, and collects privacy-safe transition evidence.

surfaces.name: Public skills external admission specification
surfaces.description: Required-workflow identity, trust boundary, scan mechanics, evidence, and source-first ratchet contract.

surfaces.name: Public skills merge-queue barrier specification
surfaces.description: Required barrier identity, evaluate-to-active lifecycle, read-only conjunctive gate, provider-owned rejection/dequeue evidence, recovery, and source-first rollout contract.

surfaces.name: Repository entry point
surfaces.description: Start-here guide linking human and machine project-control surfaces.

surfaces.name: Project control plane
surfaces.description: Human project identity, lifecycle, boundary, delivery, and validation entry point.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: check:changesets-publisher
commands.purpose: Syntax-check the manager-aware Changesets publisher without mutating release state.

commands.name: test:groundatlas-boundary
commands.purpose: Verify the neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, and released GroundAtlas workflow boundary.

commands.name: test:public-skills-admission
commands.purpose: Verify source ownership, immutable workflow wiring, target selection, policy shape, and adversarial external-admission behavior when a candidate checkout is available.

commands.name: test:public-skills-merge-queue-barrier
commands.purpose: Verify target/event/provider identity, evaluate-to-active lifecycle, exact conjunctive pass, conservative failure, zero mutation surface and GitHub-owned queue semantics without network mutation.

commands.name: test:public-skills-ruleset-executor
commands.purpose: Verify fixed identities, independent Doctrine parsing, live ratchet canaries, authorization-bound fencing, durable immutable attestations, privacy-safe collection, retention-independent active readback, and canonical evidence without network access.

commands.name: lint:github-actions
commands.purpose: Validate every organization workflow, including target required-workflow syntax and immutable action references.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected and generated GroundAtlas files are navigation-only.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for package/action dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas* reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth. The barrier organization rule is not yet Git-owned: no manual console or OAuth/API writer is authorized, and launch remains blocked until a canonical Doctrine sibling contract is reconciled by the existing protected executor and fixed lock with exact provider readback. The read-only barrier must prove a controlled evaluate-canary merge, active required failure with GitHub-owned rejection/dequeue, then final active/active pass. Public-skills external admission becomes active only after the independently protected executor reconstructs ratchet evidence, completes exact post/effective readback, creates the immutable provider attestation, and seals the privacy-safe Doctrine transition artifact.
